overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Hogwarts Legacy showing a student character entering the Hufflepuff common room, walking through the cozy underground space with wooden architecture and magical plants, observing other students playing chess, and ascending a spiral staircase to an upper balcony overlooking the main hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden corridor leading to common room entrance

events.description: character approaches and opens the large round wooden door with green stained glass panels

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the curved wooden corridor toward the round door at the end

entered.detail: large circular wooden door with green stained glass panels and intricate metal fixtures
curved wooden beams forming an arched tunnel ceiling
lit wall-mounted lantern casting warm orange light
simple stone bench against the left wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a narrow wooden corridor with arched ceilings lit by wall sconces, approaching a large round door with green stained glass panels that opens to reveal the common room beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: Hufflepuff common room main hall with seating areas

events.description: character enters the main common room through the round doorway into a large circular space
character slows and turns slightly toward a group of students playing chess

agents.ego_description: walking into the common room and approaching students seated around a chess table in the center

notable_agents.action: student sitting in orange armchair reading a book
two students playing wizard chess at a low table

entered.detail: ornate hanging chandelier with multiple warm lights suspended from ceiling
plush orange armchair with a student sitting and reading
octagonal wooden table with wizard chess set and pieces
large potted coniferous tree in a wooden planter
arched wooden doorway with stained glass leading to other areas

segments.scene_description: The character enters a spacious circular common room with wooden architecture, warm lighting from chandeliers, and comfortable seating. Several students are relaxing in armchairs, with two playing chess at a central table surrounded by potted plants.

scene_state.functional_zone: common room seating area with chess game

events.description: character stops and stands observing the wizard chess game in progress
character turns away from the chess table and begins walking toward the back of the room

agents.ego_description: standing still watching the wizard chess game, then turning to continue exploring the common room

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes sitting on sofa watching the chess game intently

entered.detail: light-colored plush armchair positioned near a floor lamp
tall standing lamp with glowing lampshade providing warm light

segments.scene_description: The character pauses to observe the wizard chess game from close proximity, standing near the table while other students sit in nearby armchairs. After watching briefly, the character turns and moves away from the central seating area.

scene_state.functional_zone: common room rear area with bulletin board and staircase

events.description: character approaches and begins ascending the wooden spiral staircase

agents.ego_description: walking across the room toward the staircase and climbing the curved wooden steps to the upper level

entered.detail: curved wooden staircase with carved railing and pumpkin-shaped newel posts
wooden notice board with papers and notices pinned to it
small potted cactus plant on a stand

segments.scene_description: The character moves toward the rear of the common room, passing a bulletin board and potted plants, then begins ascending a gracefully curved wooden staircase with ornate carved railings.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper balcony overlooking the common room hall

events.description: character reaches the top of the stairs and walks along the balcony railing
view opens up to overlook the main hall and stone fireplace below

agents.ego_description: standing on the balcony looking down at the common room hall and fireplace below

notable_agents.action: students gathered near the fireplace below seen from above

entered.detail: ornate carved wooden railing with plant and vine motifs
potted plants suspended from ceiling beams with trailing vines
large stone fireplace with burning fire visible on the lower level
polished wooden floorboards of the upper balcony level

segments.scene_description: From the upper balcony, the character overlooks the entire common room hall, with hanging plants suspended from the ceiling beams and a view of the stone fireplace burning below. The wooden railing features intricate carvings as the character gazes down at the students relaxing in the main hall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow, dimly lit corridor into the expansive, warm glow of the Hufflepuff common room, eventually ascending to a high vantage point. It begins by moving through a wooden hallway with arched ceilings and wall sconces, approaching a round green stained-glass door that opens to reveal a spacious circular hall. As the character enters the room, the scene expands into a cozy environment of wooden architecture and chandeliers, where the camera pauses briefly to observe students playing wizard chess amidst potted plants. The movement then shifts toward the rear of the space, passing a bulletin board before ascending a gracefully curved wooden staircase with ornate railings. Finally, the camera reaches an upper balcony, overlooking the entire hall with its hanging plants and a burning stone fireplace below.
